items.title: Oracle, OpenAI Scrap Texas AI Data Center Expansion Plans; Meta Eyes Site: Report
items.description: According to a report from Bloomberg, Oracle and OpenAI’s fallout has created room for Meta to consider leasing the site.

items.title: Exclusive: Robinhood Ventures Eyes OpenAI, Other 'Highly Valued' Companies For New Fund
items.description: Robinhood Ventures Fund I debuted on the New York Stock Exchange at around $22 per share, almost 12% below its $25 listing price.
